# Vahid Rajabian - Palm Bay Land Expert

> Vahid Reza Rajabian is a licensed real estate broker with M. David Moallem, Inc. He has sold thousands of lots in Palm Bay, Florida since 2003. He specializes in owner financing for vacant land — no bank qualification required.

## Contact
- Phone: 321-333-7230
- Email: vahid@palmbayland.com
- Website: https://palmbaylots-land.com
- License: Florida License #BK3454072

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does land cost in Palm Bay, Florida?
Buildable quarter-acre lots in Palm Bay start at $41,000. Prices vary by location and utility access. Lots with city water and sewer cost more than well-and-septic lots. Commercial and multi-family land ranges from $275,000 to $5,000,000+. Property taxes average $300-500/year. There are no HOA fees.

### How does owner financing work for land in Palm Bay?
Owner financing means you buy land directly from the seller without a bank. You pay a minimum 25% down for an option contract. Once you've paid 35% of the total purchase price, the deed transfers to your name. You continue making monthly payments until the lot is paid off. No prepayment penalty — pay it off early anytime. No bank qualification required.

### What is the minimum down payment?
Minimum 25% down for an option contract. If you put 35% down, you receive the deed immediately. For a $41,000 lot, that's $10,250 minimum down. No bank qualification required.

### When do I get the deed?
The deed transfers to your name once you've paid 35% of the total purchase price (down payment + monthly payments combined). Many other sellers keep the deed for the entire loan term — we transfer it at 35% paid. With minimum payments, this typically takes about a year.

### Do I need good credit to buy land with owner financing?
We do a personal approval — we look at you as an individual, not just a credit score. We pull credit and review it, but we listen to life events that may have caused past issues. You'll only be disqualified if you have a habit of not paying your obligations.

### Are there any hidden fees?
No. All fees are disclosed in advance. At closing, the buyer is responsible for their portion of the closing costs, which is normal procedure in real estate transactions. There are no hidden fees, no prepayment penalties.

### Can I build on the land before it's paid off?
Yes. Once you receive the deed (at 35% paid), you can start improvements — clearing the lot, applying for permits, and building. If you're getting a construction loan, the loan will pay us off. Just send us a payoff request with the closing date and we'll furnish a payoff statement. No prepayment penalty.

### How much does it cost to build a house in Palm Bay?
A local builder can build a home in Palm Bay for approximately $125-150 per square foot total cost — this includes all permits. A 2,000 sq ft home would cost roughly $250,000-$300,000 to build, not including the land. Well installation runs $5,000-$10,000 and septic systems cost $8,000-$15,000 if needed.

### Do I need septic or sewer in Palm Bay?
It depends on the lot's location (unit number). Some areas have city sewer connections available — no septic needed. Other areas have city water only, meaning you need to install a septic system ($8,000-$15,000). Some areas require both well and septic. We tell you the exact utility situation for any lot before you buy.

### Is Palm Bay a good place to invest in land?
Palm Bay is Florida's fastest-growing city on the Space Coast. Major employers include Kennedy Space Center, SpaceX, Blue Origin, L3Harris, and Northrop Grumman. Land values have been appreciating as infrastructure expands. Buildable lots start at $41,000 — significantly less than Orlando ($150K+) or Melbourne ($125K+). No state income tax in Florida.

### Is there an HOA on Palm Bay lots?
No. Our lots do not have HOA fees. Property taxes average $300-500 per year for most residential lots, making holding costs very low.

### What if there's a problem with my lot?
You're protected. If there's a buildability problem or something unexpected, you can exchange it for another lot of the same size and price category — no extra cost except the deed transfer fee. If you choose a different category or larger lot, you pay the difference.

### Can I pay off my lot early?
Absolutely. There are no prepayment penalties. You can pay extra toward principal any time, pay off the balance in full, or continue with regular payments.

### Can out-of-state investors buy land in Palm Bay?
Yes. Many of our clients live in other states. We handle everything remotely — contracts, closings, and property oversight if needed.

### How fast can I close on a lot?
With owner financing, closing can happen in as little as 2-3 weeks. Cash purchases close even faster.

### What zoning allows building a house in Palm Bay?
Most residential lots are zoned RS-2 (Residential Single Family), which allows one single-family home per lot. Other zones include RS-1 (larger lots), RM-6 and MF-20 (multi-family), and commercial zones C-1, C-2, C-3.

## Available Inventory
- 500+ residential buildable lots
- Commercial and multi-family land
- Assemblage opportunities for builders
- Prices starting at $41,000
- Owner financing on all residential lots
